name: IRC_RF_REFERRALS
description: This table stores referral data for direct referrals and Job shares. For Job shares, this table is populated when a candidate applies through Job share link.

columns.Name: REFERRAL_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores whether the record is active or soft deleted. Used in soft delete functionality

columns.Name: REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores REQUISITION_ID. Foreign Key to IRC_REQUISITIONS_B table.

columns.Name: REFERRER_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Stores PERSON_ID of the referrer. Foreign Key to PER_PERSONS table.

columns.Name: AGENT_ID
columns.Comments: Store Agent Id for the candidate who is referred via agency.

columns.Name: CANDIDATE_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Stores PERSON_ID of the candidate. Foreign Key to PER_PERSONS table.

columns.Name: SUBMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores SUBMISSION_ID. Foreign Key to IRC_SUBMISSIONS table.

columns.Name: SHARE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores SHARE_ID if the referral is applied for Job through Shares. Foreign Key to IRC_RF_SHARES.

columns.Name: REFERRAL_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Specifies its a direct referral or share. Stores the type of referral as a lookup code.

columns.Name: CANDIDATE_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Specifies whether the candidate is Internal or External. Stores the type of candidate as a lookup code.

columns.Name: NOTES_CANDIDATE
columns.Comments: Referrer entered notes for Candidate.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: structure definition of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
